message:
bd-k3bv: add golden tests for long-tail diagram types

Add 8 new golden test cases:
- kanban_basic: 3-column kanban board
- packet_basic: TCP packet header (packet-beta)
- architecture_basic: service architecture (architecture-beta)
- journey_basic: user journey with sections and scores
- sankey_basic: sankey flow diagram
- block_basic: block-beta with column spans
- state_composite: stateDiagram with composite states + fork/join
- sequence_advanced: sequenceDiagram with participants, notes, alt fragments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+architecture-beta
+  service api(cloud)[API Gateway]
+  service db(database)[PostgreSQL]
+  service cache(server)[Redis Cache]
+
+  api --> db
+  api --> cache

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+block-beta
+  columns 3
+
+  block:header:3
+    A["Header spans 3 columns"]
+  end
+
+  B["Left"]
+  space
+  C["Right"]
+
+  block:footer:3
+    D["Footer spans 3 columns"]
+  end

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+journey
+    title User Shopping Journey
+    section Browse
+      Visit homepage: 5: User
+      Search products: 4: User
+      View product: 5: User
+    section Purchase
+      Add to cart: 4: User
+      Checkout: 3: User
+      Payment: 2: User, System
+      Confirmation: 5: System

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+kanban
+  Todo
+    Task A
+    Task B
+  In Progress
+    Task C
+    Task D
+    Task E
+  Done
+    Task F
+    Task G

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+packet-beta
+0-15: "Source Port"
+16-31: "Destination Port"
+32-63: "Sequence Number"
+64-95: "Acknowledgment Number"
+96-99: "Data Offset"
+100-105: "Reserved"
+106-111: "Flags"
+112-127: "Window Size"

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+sankey-beta
+
+Source A,Process X,100
+Source A,Process Y,50
+Source B,Process X,75
+Source B,Process Z,25
+Process X,Output 1,120
+Process X,Output 2,55
+Process Y,Output 1,50
+Process Z,Output 2,25

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+sequenceDiagram
+  participant C as Client
+  participant S as Server
+  participant D as Database
+
+  C->>S: POST /login
+  Note right of S: Validate credentials
+  S->>D: SELECT user WHERE email=?
+  D-->>S: User record
+
+  alt Valid credentials
+    S->>D: UPDATE last_login
+    D-->>S: OK
+    S-->>C: 200 JWT Token
+    Note over C,S: Session established
+  else Invalid credentials
+    S-->>C: 401 Unauthorized
+  end
+
+  C->>S: GET /profile
+  activate S
+  S->>D: SELECT profile
+  D-->>S: Profile data
+  deactivate S
+  S-->>C: 200 Profile JSON

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+stateDiagram-v2
+  [*] --> Idle
+
+  state Processing {
+    [*] --> Validating
+    Validating --> Computing
+    Computing --> Formatting
+    Formatting --> [*]
+  }
+
+  Idle --> Processing : start
+  Processing --> Idle : complete
+  Processing --> Error : fail
+
+  state fork_state <<fork>>
+  state join_state <<join>>
+
+  Idle --> fork_state
+  fork_state --> TaskA
+  fork_state --> TaskB
+  TaskA --> join_state
+  TaskB --> join_state
+  join_state --> Complete
+
+  Error --> [*]
+  Complete --> [*]

@@ -15,8 +15,10 @@ const CASE_IDS: &[&str] = &[
     "flowchart_cycle",
     "fuzzy_keyword_recovery",
     "sequence_basic",
+    "sequence_advanced",
     "class_basic",
     "state_basic",
+    "state_composite",
     "gantt_basic",
     "pie_basic",
     "malformed_recovery",
@@ -33,6 +35,12 @@ const CASE_IDS: &[&str] = &[
     "stress_120_nodes",
     "empty_diagram",
     "single_node",
+    "kanban_basic",
+    "packet_basic",
+    "architecture_basic",
+    "journey_basic",
+    "sankey_basic",
+    "block_basic",
 ];
 
 fn golden_dir() -> PathBuf {
